name: /help explains the bot with commands list

payload.text:
ℹ️ Welcome to TableReserve!

Here's what you can do:
• /start — Open the main menu
• Book a table — Reserve a spot for your party
• My bookings — View your upcoming reservations
• /cancel — Stop a current flow (if you're in the middle of one)

Just tap /start and follow the buttons — it's that simple.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
